race.comment: FLAMING EYES (5) is ticking along superbly and gets another good chance to put her best foot forward. Charged home strongly to just miss here last time. Drops back to the mile and the tempo looks genuine enough for her to round them up late. BROWN NOSE DAY GAL (4) is also in great form, winning two on end before back-to-back placings, the latest when a narrow third here when she was prominent throughout. King goes aboard and claims 3kg to get her in really well at the weights. Has her share of talent and looks tough to deny. ZARKANA (8) continues to leave herself with too much to do but possesses a strong turn of foot. Gets the chance to settle closer from the inside alley, though she could land in a tricky spot if she can't utilise it early. SAFE BET (10) is yet to strike through this campaign but comes through some strong races. Drawn sticky but should be at top fitness on the short turnaround. Don't dismiss. Last start winner BOLTED IN (6) also warrants safe keeping.
